# DTP Launch Content Kit

Pre-written content for game portal submissions, Reddit posts, and social media.

---

## Reddit — r/WebGames

**Title:** I built an open-source reflex game where you must never touch purple — play in your browser

**Body:**
```
Hey r/WebGames! I built a browser-based reflex game and wanted to share it.

**Don't Touch Purple** — tap colored cells to score, but if you touch purple, it's over.

**What makes it different:**
- **Boss events** that shake up the rules (Storm shuffles cells at lightning speed, Blackout makes the grid invisible)
- **Two modes**: Classic (simple 3x3) and Evolve (progressive difficulty with expanding grids)
- **37 achievements** and a dust economy
- **12 animated backgrounds** (GPU-accelerated WebGL effects)
- **AI Bot Assist** companion that costs dust to activate
- Works on mobile, installable as PWA, supports gamepad

It's open source (MIT) and built with React/TypeScript. No ads, no tracking beyond analytics.

**Play it:** https://dont-touch-purple.web.app

I'd love your feedback — what's fun, what's frustrating, what boss events would you add?

GitHub: https://github.com/defaltadmin/donttouchpurple
```

---

## Reddit — r/IndieGaming

**Title:** I made an open-source browser game with boss battles, 12 animated backgrounds, and an AI companion

**Body:**
```
Don't Touch Purple is a reflex game where you tap cells to score while avoiding purple cells. Sounds simple — until the boss events hit.

**Boss Events:**
- ⚡ **Storm** — Cells shuffle at lightning speed
- 🔄 **Inversion** — Safe and danger colors swap
- 🌑 **Blackout** — The grid goes completely dark

**Why I built it:**
I wanted a game that's instantly playable (no download, no signup) but has enough depth to keep you coming back. The Evolve mode progressively increases difficulty — grids expand from 3x3 to 7x7+, special cells get introduced, and rare color modes force you to re-learn what's safe.

**Tech:** React 19, TypeScript, Vite, GSAP, Framer Motion, OGL (WebGL), Firebase. Fully open source (MIT).

**Play:** https://dont-touch-purple.web.app
**Code:** https://github.com/defaltadmin/donttouchpurple

162 unit tests, CI/CD to GitHub Pages, PWA installable on any device.

Would love to hear what you think — especially what boss events or special cells I should add next!
```

---

## Twitter/X — Launch Thread

```
🧵 I just launched an open-source browser game: Don't Touch Purple

Here's the deal: tap colored cells to score. But if you touch purple — you're done.

Sounds easy? Let me introduce the boss events...

1/5 ⚡ STORM
Cells shuffle at lightning speed. Your muscle memory betrays you.
The grid you memorized 2 seconds ago? Gone.

2/5 🔄 INVERSION
Safe and danger colors SWAP. Everything you learned is now wrong.
Green is death. Purple is safe. Your brain melts.

3/5 🌑 BLACKOUT
The grid goes COMPLETELY DARK.
You tap from memory alone. One wrong move and it's over.

4/5 The game has:
• 37 achievements
• 12 animated backgrounds (GPU-accelerated WebGL)
• AI companion (costs in-game currency)
• 5 languages
• Works on mobile, installable as PWA

5/5 It's fully open source (MIT) and runs in your browser.

Play → https://dont-touch-purple.web.app
Code → https://github.com/defaltadmin/donttouchpurple

Built with React 19, TypeScript, Vite. 162 tests. Zero downloads required.

Can you survive the purple? 🟣
```

## itch.io Description

```
DON'T TOUCH PURPLE

A reflex game where you must never touch purple cells. Tap safe colors to score — one wrong move and it's over.

FEATURES:
• Classic Mode — Pure 3x3 reflex training
• Evolve Mode — Progressive difficulty with boss events
• Boss Events: Storm (lightning shuffle), Inversion (color swap), Blackout (grid goes dark)
• 37 achievements + dust economy
• 12 animated backgrounds (GPU-accelerated)
• AI Bot Assist companion
• 5 languages (EN/ES/FR/JA/PT)
• PWA — install on any device

BROWSER GAME — No download required. Works on desktop and mobile.

Controls: Tap/click cells. That's it. Simple to learn. Brutal to master.

Open source (MIT) — https://github.com/defaltadmin/donttouchpurple
```

## Product Hunt Tagline & Description

**Tagline:** A reflex game where you must never touch purple

**Description:**
```
Don't Touch Purple is an open-source browser game that tests your reflexes. Tap colored cells to score points — but if you touch purple, it's over.

WHAT MAKES IT DIFFERENT:

🎯 Boss Events that change the rules mid-game:
   • Storm — cells shuffle at lightning speed
   • Inversion — safe and danger colors swap
   • Blackout — the grid goes completely dark

🎮 Two game modes:
   • Classic — pure 3x3 reflex training
   • Evolve — progressive difficulty with expanding grids

✨ Polish:
   • 37 achievements + dust economy
   • 12 GPU-accelerated animated backgrounds
   • AI Bot Assist companion
   • 5 languages
   • PWA installable on any device

BUILT WITH: React 19, TypeScript, Vite, GSAP, WebGL

No download. No signup. No ads. Just play.

→ https://dont-touch-purple.web.app
→ https://github.com/defaltadmin/donttouchpurple (MIT)
```

## CrazyGames / Poki Submission

**Title:** Don't Touch Purple
**Category:** Arcade / Reflex
**Description:** Tap colored cells to score — but never touch purple! Features boss events (Storm, Inversion, Blackout), 37 achievements, 12 animated backgrounds, and an AI companion. Two modes: Classic and Evolve. Installable as PWA.

**Controls:** Mouse click / Touch tap
**Mobile friendly:** Yes
**Languages:** EN, ES, FR, JA, PT
